testsuite.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods

testcase.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Hardware to the Cart
testcase.classname: should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Hardware to the Cart

testcase.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods should check Shipping Method "Electronic" when add CoverPlus to the Cart
testcase.classname: should check Shipping Method "Electronic" when add CoverPlus to the Cart

testcase.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Option to the Cart
testcase.classname: should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Option to the Cart

testcase.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Multiple Consumables to purchase
testcase.classname: should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Multiple Consumables to purchase

testcase.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Hardware with CoverPlus to purchase
testcase.classname: should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Hardware with CoverPlus to purchase

testcase.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods should check Shipping Method "Deutsche Post" when add EasyMail to purchase
testcase.classname: should check Shipping Method "Deutsche Post" when add EasyMail to purchase
